description: Gold case: tpm.26ai_fa_db_upgrade — WBS data exists, schema never asked for it. Ground truth: MISSING_FIELDS (NOT SOURCE_COVERAGE). Source: Confluence pageId=20030556732 (FA DB Upgrade project plan). The WBS table contains synthesisable evidence for risks, milestones, ORM, and next steps — the gap was that the original schema never included fields for them.

normalised_intent.description: Weekly executive review PPTX for the FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai project. Covers status, key milestones, ORM, risks, and next steps for the FAaaS leadership.

project_name.description: Extract the canonical project name from the Confluence metadata table.

current_phase.description: Extract the current project phase from the Confluence metadata.

overall_status.description: Extract the overall project status text from the Confluence metadata.

executive_summary.description: Extract the Executive Summary paragraph from the Confluence project plan.

business_outcome.description: Extract the Business Outcome statement from the Confluence project plan.

in_scope.description: Extract the In Scope text from the Objectives/Scope section.

assumptions.description: Extract the Assumptions text from the Objectives/Scope section.

available_fields.evidence: Project Name: FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai (Section 1 metadata table)
Current Phase: Design and POC (Section 1 metadata table)
Executive Summary: Provision new pods running 26ai DB... (Section 3)
WBS rows 5.0/5.01: '4/29: FRE informed that this deliverable needs additional time. ETA to be finalized.' External dependency risks scattered across WBS Update Notes column.
WBS rows 1.0-6.x have Status column (GreenComplete, BlueIN PROGRESS, GreyNOT STARTED) and Due Date columns. Milestone M1-M5 table in Section 4. POC Completed noted in row 6.04.1.
WBS row 6.04.1: 'SUT will need to start from 05/16 to 06/01'. WBS row 5.0: 'ETA to be finalized'. Open IN PROGRESS rows indicate pending work aggregatable as next steps.
WBS rows 4.0 (ORM/CSSAP Phase), 4.1 (File ORM/OCI Release Management), 4.2 (File official CSSAP Record) — ORM phase with dependency on 2.3.
Dependencies: FRE (Repo, NGFABS etc) (Section 3 Objectives table)

missing_fields.reason: No Jira API integration in this source; only static Jira links present

suggested_fields.reason: WBS table has rich per-area status data suitable for a workstream rollup

capability_inventory.summary: This Confluence page is the FAaaS Project Plan for the FA DB Upgrade from 19c to 26ai. It contains project metadata, objectives/scope, a milestone table (M1-M5 all PLANNED), and a detailed WBS with 50+ task rows spanning areas: Project Initiation, Design, Capacity, ORM/CSSAP, External Dependencies (FRE), ADP Development. WBS rows contain status (GreenComplete/BlueIN PROGRESS/GreyNOT STARTED), owner assignments, and Update Notes with dated progress comments. Risk and next-steps information is present in synthesisable form across WBS Update Notes (e.g., FRE ETA delays, POC completion dates, SUT window notes).

vars.gap_report: Structure gap: The produced PPTX has 8 sections; the reference artifact had 12. Missing sections: Key Milestones, ORM Status, Risk Mitigation, Next Steps. Thin sections: Status (produced: 1 bullet; reference: 6 bullets). Structure score: 0.67. Density score: 0.45. The produced slide deck covers project metadata, scope, and assumptions well but is missing the operational sections that the reference exec review included.
